name: rich-sidebar
title: Rich Sidebar
author: ilinxa
description: Registry-portable, framework-agnostic app-shell sidebar with mobile-drawer mode, 13-slot composition (incl. v0.2 topSlot for AccountSwitcher / context widgets), 4 prefab parts, 5 active-state variants, CSS-variable theme surface, headless useRichSidebarState hook, permissions + ownerOnly + minMembers three-gate filtering with diff-based onPermissionDenied, {key} href template substitution + resolveHref escape hatch, exported NavContext type, exported useFilteredNavSections hook (works standalone), localStorage persist, full WAI-ARIA keyboard nav + skip link, RichSidebarTrigger companion. Migration origin: kasder's SocialSidebar.tsx + socialmedia-adv-nav-system.
